content: Phase 5.1: Security Hardening - refresh tokens, sessions, rate limiting, brute-force, audit, encryption
Phase 5.2: Plan Enforcement - BASIC/PRO/ENTERPRISE limits, usage metering
Phase 5.3: Billing Ready - BillingAccount, Subscription, Invoice models + UI
Phase 5.4: Onboarding Wizard - 7-step flow with auto-detection
Phase 5.5: Guest Intelligence v2 - lifetime_value, churn_risk, satisfaction_trend
Phase 5.6: Revenue Analytics Engine - revenue, repeat rate, AI efficiency
Phase 5.7: GDPR/KVKK - export, forget, consent logs, retention policy
Phase 5.8: Performance - DB indexes on all collections, pagination
Phase 5.10: Observability - system status, metrics, demo mode
Phase 5: All Frontend pages - 6 new pages implemented and tested
Phase 5: Testing - Backend 97.4%, Frontend 95%, Guest Panels 100%
